scripts.predev: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('node_modules')) { console.error('Error: node_modules is missing! Please run \"npm install\" first.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('node_modules')) { console.error('Error: node_modules is missing! Please run \"npm install\" first.'); process.exit(1); }"
